creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
ansible has been updated from 1.1 to 1.2
	Changes: https://github.com/ansible/ansible/blob/v1.2/CHANGELOG.md

	What makes this serious is upstream changed the master site.
	This update fixes fetch.

	Port changes:
	* re-added github as fallback in case the upstream changes
	   the master site again.
	* sorted bits of pkg-plist to make the diff smaller in the future.

How-To-Repeat: 	Tested with "poudriere testport"
